programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; a man calls his mommy for help during a traffic stop; a disgruntled shopper acts deaf when police arrive; a woman drives her car into a hotel room; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; a woman bites an officer, slips her handcuffs and takes off in a police car; a man urinates on $10,000 worth of canned meat; a woman shows up at a protest march in a sexually explicit inflatable costume; and more!

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Night falls in Louisiana as officers disturb a prolific burglar who escapes into gator-infested waters. Meanwhile, undercover detectives take to the Florida swamps to hunt down a wanted felon and police responding to a welfare call are taken by surprise. Later, a car chase in Arkansas ends up in flames and a deputy makes a big bird arrest.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A berry heist sparks a manhunt into dense scrub while in Louisiana, a fugitive vanishes into the marsh at night; a stolen car chase crashes out, a K9 delivers a painful lesson, and officers race to save a mother trapped in a submerged car.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Deep in the swamps of the southern USA, a suspect swings through the trees in a desperate bid to avoid capture; a man crashes into marshland, sparking a grueling 14-hour manhunt; and in Texas, officers face an even bigger threat, as a 10-foot alligator requires some serious wrangling.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Georgia, a crazed driver slams into a patrol car before escaping into swamp woods; deputies brave Florida's treacherous wetlands at night to track down an invisible fugitive; patrol officers chase a kayaker living on a derelict houseboat among the mangroves and in Louisiana, there's a snake alert!

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend, in a bid to defend her child; considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and now faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Casey Anthony's Parents: The Lie Detector Test
programme.desc: In response to Casey Anthony's accusations against her father, George and Cindy Anthony agree to undergo polygraph tests on-camera, to answer lingering questions about George's involvement in Caylee's death.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: A deeper look into the circumstances surrounding the Chris Watts murder case includes never-before-seen footage and new interviews with Tammy Lee, the agent with the Colorado Bureau of Investigation who elicited Watt's confession.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Gabby Petito Story
programme.desc: Chronicling the twists and turns of the tragic road trip through the lens of Gabby's social media presence as told by the people who knew her best.

programme.title: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old superstar OJ Simpson while hostessing at a restaurant; they embark on a whirlwind romance which results in her filing and drawing a final line in the sand that proves to be fatal.

programme.title: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, entering an exciting new phase of her life which includes a dangerous dalliance with one of OJ's best friends; but after repeated harassment from OJ, Nicole draws a final line in the sand.

programme.title: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: As Nicole's loved ones reel from the horrific news of her murder, OJ's behavior grows increasingly erratic and bizarre.

programme.title: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: The trial of the century proves to be a media spectacle like the world has never seen, as well as a series of unfortunate mistakes and missed opportunities by the prosecution.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Ala., a 68-year-old woman goes missing after checking into a casino where she had lost millions.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects, before they strike again.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A father discovers his son stabbed multiple times in his own home, leading Tulsa Homicide on a cross-country search for his killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In North Charleston, Detective Corey Shaffer catches the toughest case of his career when musician and father-of-two Robert Rob Cobain Brown is found brutally murdered in his home.
